description: Complaint addressed to a Gaon by a son-in-law of a man who left one quarter of a house to an infant daughter and another quarter to his son. The writer probably claimed (that part of the document is torn off) that the man had also promised something to his married daughter, his wife. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, pp. 281, 489)
description_he: תלונה לגאון מחתן של איש שהוריש לבתו התינוקת רבע בית ולבנו רבע נוסף. הכותב תובע כנראה שגם בתו הנשואה — אשתו — הובטח לה חלק.
